code:
%% Git graph: Trunk-based development with short-lived feature branches
%% Main branch is the trunk; features branch off and merge back quickly
%% Tags mark releases cut from main

gitGraph
    commit id: "init"
    commit id: "setup CI"

    %% Feature branch for auth - short-lived, merges back quickly
    branch feature/auth
    checkout feature/auth
    commit id: "add login endpoint"
    commit id: "add JWT middleware"
    checkout main
    merge feature/auth id: "merge auth"

    commit id: "update deps"

    %% Another short-lived feature branch
    branch feature/dashboard
    checkout feature/dashboard
    commit id: "add dashboard UI"
    commit id: "add charts"
    checkout main
    merge feature/dashboard id: "merge dashboard"

    %% Tag a release from trunk
    commit id: "bump version" tag: "v1.0.0"

    %% Hotfix branches also merge directly to main
    branch hotfix/login-fix
    checkout hotfix/login-fix
    commit id: "fix token refresh"
    checkout main
    merge hotfix/login-fix id: "merge hotfix" tag: "v1.0.1"
repo_description: Mermaid diagram management CLI — extract, render, inject

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们想画一个主干开发模式的Git流程图。核心是main分支作为主干，所有功能分支都是短周期的，快速合并回去。另外要用tag标记版本发布。
明白了，主干开发模式。那功能分支的命名有什么规范吗？比如auth相关的功能，是叫feature/auth还是直接叫auth？
用feature/auth这种命名，清晰表明是功能分支。这个分支从main切出来，做登录相关的开发，包括login endpoint和JWT middleware，然后快速合并回main。
好的，feature/auth分支画好了，两个commit都已经合并到main。接下来还有别的功能分支吗？
再加一个feature/dashboard分支，同样是短周期的，做dashboard UI和charts，合并完之后我们在main上打第一个版本标签v1.0.0。
feature/dashboard合并完成，v1.0.0标签也加上了。那hotfix流程怎么体现？也是走主干模式吗？
对，hotfix也是短周期分支，直接从main切hotfix/login-fix，修复token refresh问题，合并后打v1.0.1标签。所有分支最终都回归主干。
全部完成了。主干上现在能看到两个feature分支的合并点，一个hotfix合并点，以及v1.0.0和v1.0.1两个版本标签，结构很清晰。
